_comment: Canonical, ordered list of npm scripts that make up the policy-tests job, shared between .github/workflows/ci.yml and scripts/local-ci/entrypoint.sh so the two stop hand-drifting (a change to one used to have nothing keeping the other in sync). entrypoint.sh reads this file directly and loops over it. ci.yml keeps its own explicit per-script steps (for readable, individually-attributed GitHub Actions UI output), but founder-os/tests/run-ci-drift-tests.js asserts ci.yml's steps still match this list exactly, in order.
